return(function(z,l,n,A,w,q,B,c,V,N,i,r,C,h,H,m,b,K,T,S,X,I)h,b,T,K,I,r,c,C,V,S,X,H,m,N,i=function(z,L)local l=N(L)local n=function(n)return c(z,{n},L,l)end return n end,function(z,L)local l=N(L)local c(z,{},L,l)end return n end,function(c,n,A,w)local Q,u,F,d,E,W,M,g,N,G,Z,K,U,j,s,J,y,D,R,Lx,t,B,o,p,I,k,e,Y,C,f,v,zx,P,O,V,a,x while c do if c<8515606-900378 then if c<4372968-(-16131)then if
